entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop studied for head miner attraction and oviposition preferences.

entities.name: MILLET HEAD MINER
entities.description: The pest Heliocheilus albipunctella whose oviposition preferences are being studied.

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The process of egg-laying by the gravid female head miner.

entities.name: GROWTH STAGE
entities.description: The developmental phase of the crop, including 30%, 50%, 100% panicle stage, flowering, and dough-filling stage.

entities.name: MULTI- AND NO-CHOICE TESTS
entities.description: Experimental tests used to determine the oviposition preference of the head miner.

entities.name: METHANOL EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of using methanol to create extracts from panicles, leaves, and stems for preference testing.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop used as a comparison for the oviposition preference of the millet head miner.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET CULTIVARS
entities.description: Specific varieties of pearl millet including 3/4HK, MBH110, ICMV IS 89305, and Chalakh.
